payload.answer: The system cannot commit this memory to durable storage due to low confidence and ambiguity. Escalation to the user (Sam) is required to clarify the intended meaning of 'cascade' and the context of the note.

details: Memory not committed to durable storage (violation of 'preserve ambiguity' and 'no superseded facts' rules).
